item_text: I can find a required technical document within 60 seconds.
I can quickly find solutions from past incidents when needed.
I know exactly where project and operational data live.
I trust the shared system enough to stop keeping personal copies.
I am confident the file I open is the latest master version.
Each document clearly shows its author/owner.
The knowledge base is updated promptly when standards change.
Obsolete data are clearly marked or archived.
Past-incident references reduce my diagnosis time.
The KMS interface is intuitive and easy to navigate.
I reuse existing troubleshooting guides when handling incidents.
Lessons learned are easy to locate and apply.
The system reduces the recurrence of repeated incidents.
I am motivated to document my solutions in the system.
It is easier to share expertise with new team members.
Overall operational efficiency in the NOC has improved.
I save measurable time per incident using the KMS.
How long does it typically take to retrieve a needed document?
How frequently do you encounter incidents already documented or resolved?
Overall, working with the KMS feels efficient.
